Login.signUpNotice: Account created. Check your email to confirm, then sign in.
Login.googleNoCodeError: Google sign-in did not return a code.
Login.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
Login.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email address before signing in.
Login.accountExists: An account already exists for this email address.
Login.signInFailed: Could not sign in. Please try again.
Login.signUpFailed: Could not create the account. Please try again.

Onboarding.promiseTitle:
Every voice deserves
a fair score.
Onboarding.promiseBody: See your performance across 9 vocal criteria. Verified listens strengthen your score over time.
Onboarding.trustTitle:
AI starts it.
Real listens sharpen it.
Onboarding.trustBody: VoxScore never shows a single magic number — it shows exactly how your score is built.
Onboarding.chain3Sub: A starting point — not the final verdict.
Onboarding.intentTitle: What do you want to do on VoxScore?
Onboarding.intentBody: Your choice takes you straight to your first value moment.
Onboarding.singerSub: Send a YouTube link, see your score on 9 criteria.
Onboarding.jurorSub: Listen to two performances, pick the winner.
Onboarding.explorerSub: Browse leagues and scores without an account.
Onboarding.pathSingerBody: Send a YouTube link. After review, see your score on 9 criteria and take your place in the leagues.
Onboarding.pathSingerNote: Sign-in is only asked when needed.
Onboarding.pathJurorBody: Listen to two performances to the end, pick the winner, and climb your season with prediction points.
Onboarding.pathJurorNote: Sign-in is only asked when needed.
Onboarding.pathExplorerBody: Start browsing song rankings, current scores and season leagues without an account.

Profile.votedEmpty: You have not listened to and rated a performance yet.
Profile.empty: You haven't added any performances yet.
Profile.notSignedInSub: Sign in to see your profile and performances.
Profile.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes your account and all your performances, scores, votes, and listen history. This cannot be undone.
Profile.deleteFinalBody: This is your last chance to cancel. Your account will be permanently deleted.
Profile.sessionExpired: Your session expired — please sign in again and retry.
Profile.deleteGenericError: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

Song.sub: Who sings this song best — ranked by score.
Song.empty: No performances of this song yet.

Standings.title: Battle standings
Standings.empty: No battles yet. Open the Battle arena to start one.

League.title: Weekly League
League.signIn: Sign in to see your weekly cohort.
League.empty: You will enter a cohort next Monday. Verified activity earns points now.
League.error: The weekly league could not be loaded.

Leagues.title: Your private leagues
Leagues.error: The league could not be updated.
Leagues.nameTooShort: League name must be at least 3 characters.
Leagues.name: League name

Measure.linkPathBody: Your own performance or a cover you love — add the link and the AI scores it on 9 criteria. No microphone needed.
Measure.devBuildRequired: Measuring your take needs the full VoxScore build — it is not available in Expo Go.
Measure.title: Create the first AI score
Measure.aiJudgeBody: Sing a clear 15–120 second section of your own performance. VoxScore compares the measured pitch, timing, transitions, sustain and dynamics with the verified song reference. This becomes the opening score; verified listener votes gradually take over, and at 100 votes the score is entirely community-owned.
Measure.privacyNotice: The WAV is processed only in Analyzer memory, then deleted from the server request and this device. We keep the measurements and a one-way file hash, never the audio.
Measure.aiJudgeResultNote: The verified AI opening score is ready. From now on, each verified listener vote increases the community share until it reaches 100% at vote 100.
Measure.tooShortError: Keep singing for at least 15 seconds before measuring.
Measure.recordingTooLargeError: This recording is too large. Record again within the 120-second limit.
Measure.referenceNotReadyError: This song's verified melody reference is not ready yet.
Measure.rejectedError: The recording did not pass the quality gate. Record again in a quieter place and stay close to the microphone.

rejection.invalid_wav: The recording file could not be read. Please record again.
rejection.too_short: The recording is too short. Sing for at least 15 seconds.
rejection.too_long: The recording is longer than 120 seconds.
rejection.too_noisy: There is too much background noise for a fair score.
rejection.too_much_clipping: The recording is distorted. Move slightly away from the microphone.
rejection.low_voicing: Not enough clear singing was detected.
rejection.low_pitch_confidence: Pitch could not be tracked reliably. Sing without backing audio.
rejection.reference_mismatch: The take could not be matched to this song's melody reference.
rejection.low_confidence: Measurement confidence was too low for a verified score. Record in a quieter spot, closer to the mic.

Measure.signinPrompt: Sign in to measure your recording ›
Measure.honestyBody1: Sing 20–60 seconds of YOUR OWN performance into the microphone. Our server measures the audio itself — pitch control, timing, vibrato, signal quality — and those four criteria replace the AI estimate with a Measured score.
Measure.honestyBody2: Your audio is analyzed, then deleted immediately — on the server and on this device. Only the measured numbers are kept.
Measure.recordingMax: Recording… max {{time}}. Sing close to the microphone.
Measure.resultNote: These four criteria now show as Measured on your performance; the rest keep the AI estimate and community votes. Your audio has been deleted.
Measure.micPermissionError: Microphone permission is required to measure your recording.
Measure.startError: Could not start recording — close other apps using the microphone.
Measure.sessionExpiredError: Your session expired — sign in again to measure.
Measure.notOwnerError: Only the performer can measure their own performance.

Language.label: Language
Language.restartBody: This language changes text direction. Please close and reopen VoxScore for the layout to update fully.

Request.title: Add a performance
Request.subtitle: Paste a YouTube link. We check it immediately and add it to the system if it is valid. We never download it; we only embed it.
Request.reviewNote: If the video passes metadata and scoring checks, it appears in the league right away. If not, nothing is added.
Request.successBody: Performance ID: {{id}}. The video was checked and added to the system.
Request.noRequests: You haven't added a performance yet.
Request.signInPrompt: Sign in to add a performance
Request.sessionExpired: Your session expired — sign in again and retry.
Request.duplicateVideo: That video is already in the league.
Request.duplicatePending: This video already has an add in progress.
Request.invalidUrl: That doesn’t look like a valid YouTube link.

Battle.sub: Two performances, one winner. Listen to both, then decide.
Battle.signInBody: Battles pit two performances head-to-head. Sign in to listen to both and pick the winner.
Battle.emptyBody: Not enough performances to battle yet. Add more from the leaderboard, then check back.
Battle.missingVideo: This battle is missing a video. Try another.
Battle.sessionExpiredLoad: Your session expired — sign in again and retry.
Battle.gateLocked: Listen to BOTH performances fully to unlock the winner pick.
Battle.gateUnlocked: Both performances listened — pick your winner.
Battle.embedBlockedHint: Embedding disabled — plays on YouTube only, can’t verify here.
Battle.keepWatching: Keep watching for 1 second to unlock rating…
Battle.notFullyListened: Listen not verified — watch again for at least 1 second.
Battle.pressPlay: Press play and watch for at least 1 second.
Battle.signInToPick: Sign in to pick a winner ›
Battle.sessionExpiredVote: Your session expired — sign in again to vote.
Battle.bothMustBeListened: Both performances must be watched for at least 1 second to vote.
Battle.alreadyVoted: You have already voted in this battle.

Performance.embedBlockedHint: The uploader disabled embedding, so this video only plays on YouTube — an in-app Verified Listen (required to vote) isn’t possible for it.
Performance.verifiedHint: Verified Listen complete — you can vote now.
Performance.listeningHint: Keep watching the video to the end. The rating panel opens after the full watch is verified; leaving or skipping ahead will not unlock voting.
Performance.invalidHint: The listen was not verified. Start again and continue to the end without leaving the player; then you can score it.
Performance.idleHint: Press play and continue watching to the end. You can score the performance only after the full watch is verified.
Performance.aiScoreRequired: Watching is complete, but voting stays closed until the performer creates the verified AI opening score from their own recording.
Performance.signInToVote: Sign in to submit your vote ›
Performance.listenRequired: A completed Verified Listen is required to vote.
Performance.sessionExpiredVote: Your session expired — sign in again to vote.
Performance.selfVote: You cannot vote on your own performance.
Performance.attestationGate: Verification required. Voting from the app unlocks once device attestation ships — you can vote on the web for now.
Performance.alreadyVoted: You have already voted on this performance.
Performance.measuredCaption: Measured criteria come from the artist’s own submitted recording — the audio is analyzed, then deleted.
Performance.noComments: No comments yet — be the first.
